calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Donegan for Monica Lucs (Successor Administrator). James Bridgman for Calvin Culp (Former Administrator).

The Parties presented oral argument to support their postitions with regard to the fee requests. The amount of fees requested for defense of the petition to remove Mr. Kulp were withdrawn by Mr. Bridgman. The Parties agreed that the automobile belongs to Mr. Kulp. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Maria Lertora, CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for and with the Administrator. John Donegan for and with Monika Lucs.

Mr. Bridgman stated that he would amend the accounting and that he would be able to close the estate. Mr. Donegan stated that he did not think a proper account would be filed, that Mr. Bridgman would not be able to close the estate and requested the sole beneficiary be appointed as the Administrator. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Linda Forster CSR#13286. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Mann.

Petition Of Sole Beneficiary Monika Lucs For Order Removing Calvin Culp As Administrator Cta
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Continued To Apr-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Bridgman for Calvin Culp (Administrator). John Donegan for Monika Lucs (Petitioner).

Mr. Bridgman informed the Court that the accounting petition had been filed this morning. No hearing date had been set by the Clerk as no notice of hearing was provided. The matter was continued to April 29, 2008.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Continued To Mar-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Donegan for and with Monika Lucs (Petitioner). James Bridgman for Calvin culp (Administrator).

Mr. Bridgman reported that he was ready to move forward, and that the final inventory and appraisal had been done. Mr. Bridgamn raised the issue regarding co-mingling of assets. The matter was continued to March 25, 2008. The accounting must be filed by that date or surcharge will be assessed.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Joann Prior CSR 129. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1163 South Van Ness Ave. San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: James C. Bridgman appearing for the estate. John Donegan appearing for Monika Lucs. Mr. Bridgman wanted to enforce the settlement to sell the 50% interest with court confirmation. Mr. Donegan has not objection to the sale and he suggested to start all over again with a 9860 petition. Counsel can do whatever way he wishes. This petition is off calendar.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR# 2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.
